title: Bounded Recurrence And Invariant Checks

solver_reuse.target: bounded recurrence bad-transition, bad-threshold, and bad-invariant QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed exact recurrence rows where replay computes the transition next state as 4 but a row claims 5, computes state 6 at step 2 below threshold 7 but a row claims threshold reachability, and terminal/max state 8 but a row claims the invariant upper bound is 6.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional dynamics rows only when they add distinct transition, reachability, invariant, or finite-error pressure; keep continuous-time existence, uniqueness, stability, chaos, and PDE theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode bounded recurrence traces as deterministic LRA/BV transition systems.
Replay safe invariant witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.

Emit checked QF_LRA/Farkas proof rows for finite recurrence claims; the replay rows compute the exact trace values and separate qf-lra-bad-transition-step, qf-lra-bad-threshold-step, and qf-lra-bad-invariant-bound rows own the checked evidence.
Add broader bounded-model-checking rows only when they expose distinct transition-system pressure.
Keep continuous-time existence, uniqueness, stability, chaos, and PDE theory marked Lean-horizon.
